title: SimpleJobs
description: The Ultimate (simple) Jobs Plugin for any small-scale Server or SMP with your Friends. Trust me, it's THAT easy to configure!
body:
# 🪓 SimpleJobs - The Ultimate (simple) Jobs Plugin.

SimpleJobs makes it easy for you as Owner of the Server and your Players to have Jobs. This Plugin is meant for small-scale Servers or private SMP projects with your friends. It's a very basic but clean and modern looking Jobs Plugin.

The Features of this Plugin are simple: Join one of the five Jobs (Miner, Woodcutter, Fisher, Farmer or Hunter) and earn Money! There is no Leveling System or anything, just Jobs in a clean and beautiful GUI. (You can also use Commands to join and leave Jobs).

**⚠️ Compatibility Information:** This Plugin was only tested on Minecraft 1.21.10, it will probably work for all Versions from 1.21+ onwards. However official support is always only for the latest Minecraft Version!

## **📌 Feature Overview:**
✅ **5 Jobs:** Miner, Woodcutter, Farmer, Fisher & Hunter
✅ **Multiple or Single Job(s):** Permissions rule how many Jobs a Player can have
✅ **100% Customizable GUI's:** All GUI's can be changed to your taste
✅ **Easy2Edit Configs:** It's extremely easy to change literally anything
✅ **Multipliers:** Give Bonus Money via Permissions
✅ **PlaceholderAPI:** 5 different PAPI Placeholders
✅ **Vault Economy:** Uses Vault as Economy
✅ **Customizable Income:** Change Income for every single Item/Block
✅ C**ustomizable Blocks/Items:** Change every single Item/Block/Mob for Jobs

## 📝 **Dependencies**
This Plugin, in order to work, needs Vault, EssentialsX (Economy Handler) and PlaceholderAPI.

## **📈 Planned Features:** 
**_(Don't ask when they come please)_**

🧷 **Job Milestones:** Unlock Milestones with a Job and get Bonus Rewards
🧷 **Job Leveling:** Level up a Job to unlock Multipliers & more

## **⛓️‍💥 Placeholders:**
**%simplejobs_job_list% -** Shows all Jobs a Player currently has (Full Name)
**%simplejobs_job% -** Shows all Jobs a Player currently has (Short Name)
**%simplejobs_multiplier% -** Shows the Payout Multiplier a Player has
**%simplejobs_jobs_count% -** Shows how many Jobs a Player currently has
**%simplejobs_max_jobs% -** Shows the max. amount of Jobs a Player can have


## **📃 Commands:**
**/sj reload -** Reloads all Plugin Configs
**/sj jobs -** Opens the Jobs Main GUI
**/sj jobs join <Job> -** Joins a specific Job
**/sj jobs leave <Job> -** Leaves a specific Job
**/sj info -** Shows which Job(s) you currently have
**/sj jobs <Job> -** Opens a specific Job GUI
**/jobs -** Alias Command to open the Jobs Main GUI

## **🔐 Permission:**
**simplejobs.admin.* -** Gives access to ALL Commands
**simplejobs.jobs.1 -** Player can have 1 Job (Default: True)
**simplejobs.jobs.2 -** Player can have 2 Jobs
**simplejobs.jobs.3 -** Player can have 3 Jobs
**simplejobs.jobs.4 -** Player can have 4 Jobs
**simplejobs.jobs.5 -** Player can have 5 Jobs
**simplejobs.premium.10 -** Gives a 10% Payout Multiplier (x1.1)
**simplejobs.premium.25 -** Gives a 25% Payout Multiplier (x.1.25)
**simplejobs.premium.50 -** Gives a 50% Payout Multiplier (x1.5)
**simplejobs.premium.75 -** Gives a 75% Payout Multiplier (x1.75)
**simplejobs.premium.100 -** Gives a 100% Payout Multiplier (x2.0)

If you have any Problems or need Support with the Plugin, feel free to join my Discord Server and ask me via a Support Ticket. I'm happy to help you out!

Also if you find a Bug or have a Feature Suggestions, be sure to do the same. Hop on Discord, create a Ticket and send me a Suggestion. :)

Happy Earning!
~ Pallux
